title: Digital Marketing Analyst
description: General Mills is seeking a Digital Marketing Analyst to drive growth through data-driven marketing strategies across our iconic consumer brands. You'll analyze campaign performance, identify market trends, and recommend optimizations that increase brand awareness and consumer engagement. Work remotely while contributing to multi-channel marketing initiatives for household names.
responsibilities: Analyze digital marketing campaign performance across email, social media, search, and display channels
Track and report on key performance indicators using analytics platforms and dashboards
Identify trends in consumer behavior and competitive landscape insights
Develop actionable recommendations to optimize campaign ROI and conversion rates
Support A/B testing initiatives and provide statistical analysis of results

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Analytics, or related field
skills: Google Analytics or similar web analytics platforms
Excel with advanced functions and pivot tables

benefits: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage
